Orion is one AI investigation platform: blockchain forensics across 50+ chains, multi-source OSINT (Babel Street, Vetric), credential exposure (SpyCloud, Hudson Rock), corporate/PEP/sanctions/adverse-media (Aurelius, ComplyAdvantage, Sanctions.io), threat intel (Flashpoint, SOCRadar). Court-ready outputs supporting SAR/STR quality and regulator audits.
contacts: Regulators / supervisors: BoT, SEC Thailand, AMLO
Target customers: Bangkok Bank, Kasikornbank, SCB, Krungthai, TMBThanachart, Bitkub, Zipmex (post-restructuring)
Buy roles: Chief Compliance Officer / Head of Financial Crimes, Head of FIU, Head of Fraud, MLRO, Chief Risk Officer, CISO (for cyber-FinCrime convergence)
Influence stakeholders: Internal Audit (regulator audit posture), Privacy/DPO, Legal/General Counsel, Group CIO for SaaS validation
Champion archetype: Compliance leader under MRA/MRIA / regulator-letter pressure; FinCrime head whose investigations are slower than peers
fin.competitors: In Thailand financial services: Chainalysis Reactor / KYT (crypto-only, needs RegTech wrapping) · Elliptic Investigator (crypto-only) · ComplyAdvantage / Refinitiv / LexisNexis Risk / NICE Actimize (sanctions/PEP-only, no investigation orchestration) · SAS / Quantexa / Featurespace (transaction-monitoring AI, not investigation platforms) · i2 / Palantir Foundry (legacy/services-heavy graph tools, no native crypto). Orion is the only platform that lets one analyst run an end-to-end FinCrime investigation across all signals.
actions: Lead with regulator-aligned wedge: Anti-Money Laundering Act compliance is the door-opener — frame Orion as audit-defense capability
Map decision committee: CCO + CISO + MLRO at Bangkok Bank via Apollo enrichment
Compelling event hook: Pig-butchering compound enforcement (TH-Myanmar border raids)
Reference selection: Use peer-bank case studies (anonymized) where Orion replaced 4-5-tool stack with measurable false-positive reduction and SAR cycle-time improvement
Demo: Live investigation on an in-the-news ransomware payment or pig-butchering wallet — show end-to-end pivot in <5 minutes with audit-ready evidentiary packet

POC framing: Propose 60-day pilot on a defined investigation type (sanctions hit, ransomware payment, or VASP counterparty risk) with named KPIs (cycle time, false-positive reduction, analyst capacity)
Procurement readiness: Map data residency + cyber due diligence requirements for Thailand (sovereign cloud, SOC2/ISO/sectoral cert) early to avoid 90-day delay
